scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" pnpm exec next build
scripts.cf:build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.deploy:app: pnpm run cf:build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
